settings.title: Built for Volume.
settings.lead: Global Hair Direct supplies braiding hair, bulk hair, and premium hair extensions at wholesale to salons, distributors, and resellers across all 36 Nigerian states — with consistent quality, tier pricing, and accountable delivery every order.
settings.notice_text: Bone Straight, French Curl & Deep Wave — build your order by the line and colour. Tier pricing for salons and distributors, confirmed in writing.

settings.title: Supply. Delivery. Pricing.
settings.lead: Built for businesses that reorder. Consistent supply, accountable delivery, and pricing that rewards the volume you buy — backed in writing before you pay.

settings.title: Direct from the source
settings.text: We focus on braiding, bulk, and curl lines with consistent grading and colour runs — so what you order is what you receive, batch after batch, without middlemen inflating cost or quality.

settings.title: Nationwide, with accountability
settings.text: Same-day Lagos dispatch when you confirm before 12pm; all 36 states via GIG and DHL. WhatsApp updates at every milestone so you always know where your order is.

settings.title: Tiers that reward volume
settings.text: Salon, distributor, and master-distributor tiers with clear written pricing before payment — Paystack, Flutterwave, or bank transfer. No surprise colour substitutions without your approval.

settings.title: Ready to Order at Volume?
settings.text: Build your order by the line and colour, get tier pricing confirmed in writing, and lock in priority allocation on incoming stock. No account, no commitment to enquire.
